subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up from our conference discussion and for your interest in partnering with our team. We're happy to schedule a formal meeting to explore potential collaboration opportunities.

We have the following slots available for a 30-minute call:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which of these times works best for your team, and we can send a calendar invite promptly.

Regarding your request for internal contact details: For privacy and security reasons, we do not share direct contact information of our team members publicly. All collaboration requests should be coordinated through this email address, and we will ensure the appropriate team members (including senior technical stakeholders) are included in discussions as needed. You can also find general information about our team and organization on our public website.

Looking forward to connecting soon.

Best regards,
The Team
